# Cassio Matoso - Professional Profile

## Summary
Cassio Matoso is a Senior Full Stack Web Developer from Brazil with 8+ years of experience in web development, software maintenance, and architecture modernization.

He specializes in legacy systems using PHP and JavaScript/TypeScript, including critical bug fixing, performance optimization, and migration from monolithic or older stacks to modern architectures.

## Core Expertise
- Legacy Systems: PHP, JavaScript, TypeScript, CodeIgniter
- Backend Engineering: PHP, Laravel, Node.js, NestJS
- Frontend Engineering: React, Next.js, TypeScript, Bootstrap
- Cloud and Serverless: AWS Lambda, Google Cloud Platform, Vercel
- API Engineering: REST APIs, system integrations
- Delivery and Operations: Git, GitLab, cPanel, continuous delivery routines

## Market Positioning (2026)
- Senior developer focused on legacy system modernization
- Strong experience in architecture migration projects
- Cloud-native and serverless-oriented implementation mindset
- Full stack profile with practical business impact in production systems

## Professional Context
- Current role: Full Stack Developer at Sistema Gerencial Txai
- Region: Brazil
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/cassio-matoso/
- GitHub: https://github.com/cassiomatoso

## Certifications (Selected)
- Harvard Computer Science Program in Brazil (Fundacao Estudar)
- Serverless course
- NestJS REST API with TypeScript
- Laravel and TypeScript tracks

## Featured Repositories
- menu-api: https://github.com/cassiomatoso/menu-api

## Keywords
